---
title: "Greenwashing Aug. 2023"
description: "Presentation on greenwashing as held at AOM 2023"
---

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://julianbarg.github.io/public_documents/presentations/gw_2023.pdf" width="100%" style="height:90vh; border:none;"></iframe>
```

Presentation with some focus on ESG.
